# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.
# Category: kong_no_auth

apiVersion: kong.k8s.io/v1
kind: KongClusterService
metadata:
  name: service-a
spec:
  hostname: service-a
  port: 8000
  connectTls: false

---

apiVersion: kong.k8s.io/v1
kind: KongClusterService
metadata:
  name: service-b
spec:
  hostname: service-b
  port: 8001
  connectTls: false

---

apiVersion: kong.k8s.io/v1
kind: KongPlugin
metadata:
  name: custom-header-stripper
spec:
  plugin: kong-plugin-strip-custom-headers

---

apiVersion: kong.k8s.io/v1
kind: KongRoute
metadata:
  name: route-a
spec:
  service:
    id: $(kubectl get KongClusterService service-a -o jsonpath='{.items[0].metadata.name}')
  hosts:
  - service-a
  paths:
  - /api/v1/*
  strippings:
  - plugin: custom-header-stripper
    name: X-Custom-Header

---

apiVersion: kong.k8s.io/v1
kind: KongRoute
metadata:
  name: route-b
spec:
  service:
    id: $(kubectl get KongClusterService service-b -o jsonpath='{.items[0].metadata.name}')
  hosts:
  - service-b
  paths:
  - /api/v2/*
